name: @aprimediet/minion
description: Lean subagent delegation for the pi coding agent — single / parallel / chain modes with isolated subprocesses. v2.1 adds primary-agent (plan/build) persona switching for the main loop. v2.1.1 fixes model format persistence; v2.1.2 adds guard flag to prevent programmatic model loads from overwriting settings.json.

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); if(!pkg.files||pkg.files.length===0){console.error('files field empty — abort');process.exit(1)}; console.log('Publishing '+pkg.name+'@'+pkg.version+' with files:', pkg.files)"
